description: A small book of comics from Japan, with adventurers in another world, schoolkids enjoying the last days of summer, giant robots, or men yelling as they power up their attacks.
A volume of "One Piece", about one boy's quest to become the next legendary Pirate King.
A volume of "Dragon Ball", a retelling of the Chinese classic "Journey to the West" with aliens and martial arts tournaments thrown into the mix.
A volume of "Naruto", the story of a hidden village of ninjas and one boy with a powerful spirit sealed inside his body.
A volume of "Hunter x Hunter", the story of a boy following in his father's footsteps to become a "Hunter" and travel the world to find the rare, the hidden, the bizarre, and the inexplicable.
A volume of "Demon Slayer", the story of a boy's attempts to free his sister from a demonic curse.
A volume of "Jujutsu Kaisen", the story of hidden societies of warring sorcerers.
A volume of "Bleach", the story of a high-school boy who can see ghosts and is forced to join a group of warriors battling against malevolent spirits.
A volume of "JoJo's Bizarre Adventure", the story of the Joestar family and their struggle against the vampire Dio Brando, using martial arts and supernatural powers named after Western rock bands.
A volume of "Captain Tsubasa", the story of Tsubasa Oozora's rise from a soccer-obsessed primary schooler to the captain of a national team.
A volume of "Gintama", the story of a samurai doing odd jobs during the Edo period in a Japan that's been conquered by aliens.
A volume of "Fairy Tail", the story of a woman who joins a wizard's guild called "Fairy Tail" and their conflict with rival wizard's guilds.
A volume of "Berserk", the story of a wandering warrior and his quest for vengeance that's formed part of the inspiration for basically every work of dark fantasy written in the last forty years.
